body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9795", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-266", "name": "Incorrect Privilege Assignment"}], "description": "### Description\nA flaw was found in Keycloak's Fine-Grained Admin Permissions (FGAPv2) feature. An administrator with limited client management permissions can exploit this vulnerability to assign any realm role, including highly privileged roles, to a client's scope mapping. This bypasses intended security controls, allowing the injected role to be projected into a user's authentication token when they access the modified client. This could lead to unauthorized privilege escalation within the Keycloak realm.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00292, "percentile": 0.20894}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9795"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/security/advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9795", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/50350", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/50451", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/8894c027e788904c740ff9a1a60fcfaa34a10d13", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30049", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30050", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30083", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:30084", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-9795", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2482462", "https://security.access.redhat.com/data/csaf/v2/vex/2026/cve-2026-9795.json", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/keycloak/keycloak/security-advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak", "summary": "Keycloak has privilege escalation via improper scope mapping enforcement", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T21:20:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.6.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-services"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Keycloak has privilege escalation via improper scope mapping enforcement
